FOnline ThirdParty pruning notes

This vendored copy is intentionally trimmed for the engine build. When updating
from upstream, remove these paths again after copying the new version.

Removed paths:
- doc/
- macosx/
- win32/
- aclocal.m4
- compile
- config.guess
- config.h.in
- config.sub
- configure
- configure.in
- depcomp
- include/Makefile.am
- include/Makefile.in
- install-sh
- libogg.spec
- libogg.spec.in
- ltmain.sh
- Makefile.am
- Makefile.in
- missing
- ogg.m4
- ogg.pc.in
- ogg-uninstalled.pc.in
- src/Makefile.am
- src/Makefile.in
